description: Product description Enjoy timeless elegance with this pack of 40 Bolsius White 10 Hour Maxi Tea Lights . These classic candles have an extra long burn time and look great dotted around the room to create a relaxing atmosphere. Bolsius Maxi 10 Hour Tea Lightslook gorgeous in any maxi tea light candle holder and are also perfect for use in oil and wax tart burners. They are perfect for creating a welcoming atmosphere, on the dining table or anywhere in the home. 40 Long Burning Maxi Tea Lights Great value Burn for 10 hours per tea light Place in an appropriate Maxi Light Tea Light Holders Safety Warning Keep the candle away from flammable materials, never let the candle burn unattended, pay attention to the burning time and dispose of candle residues professionally.
